title: spex per-node layout metadata (nodes.json)
description: Written by `spex graph-layout` alongside a tileset — graph pipeline only, absent for plain point-cloud tilesets from `spex convert`. One entry per graph node, including any fan-out-cap synthetic "+N more" nodes (see docs/ARCHITECTURE.md) which don't exist in the original graph.json. Gives each node's resolved 3D position, in the same offset-relative coordinate frame as tileset.json/octree points, plus everything from the original GraphNode. Used by the viewer for hover tooltips.
